The '''Gryyyl asteroid belt''' was an asteroid field within the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]] located between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]].
